name: procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewal deadlines cause supplier penalties. We provide timely notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
